channel.title: Learn to Code on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Learn to Code on simeononsecurity

item.title: Getting Started in Software Development
item.category: "getting started in software development" , "learn to code" , "programming career beginner" , "software developer entry point" , "how to become a software developer"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin a software development career, from choosing your first programming language to understanding specializations and career paths.
